name: Endexx Corporation
summary: CBD Unlimited, Inc. provides cannabidiol (CBD) products. The company's products include CBD oils, CBD delayed release veggie-caps, CBD for pets, CBD topicals, and CBD drinks. The company was formerly known as Endexx Corporation and changed its name to CBD Unlimited, Inc. in November 2018. CBD Unlimited, Inc. was founded in 2014 and is based in Cave Creek, Arizona.
